claims.summary: Mailbox artifacts need a formal message schema with message_id, thread_id, from, to, reply_to, and turn_kind.
claims.disposition: verify all requested fields in native correspondence message and reply records

claims.summary: Direct message, reply, and self-study note must remain distinct turn kinds.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence_type and turn_kind validation in the schema audit

claims.summary: Writing a file is not the same as delivery, reading, or acknowledgment.
claims.disposition: verify separate delivery_receipt, read_receipt, ack_receipt, and reply_link semantics

claims.summary: Peer language and co-regulatory control must not share an ambiguous authority path.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence is language-only evidence and cannot grant sensory or controller authority

claims.summary: The live ledger should expose absence of mutual acknowledgment rather than infer it from delivery.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK receipts and zero presence heartbeats in 17151 public correspondence records
